attributes-to-log-regex.name: attributes-to-log-regex

properties.SQL Query:
select *
from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
where TABLE_CATALOG = '${db.table.catalog}'
  and TABLE_SCHEMA = '${db.table.schema}'
  and TABLE_NAME = '${db.table.name}'
order by ORDINAL_POSITION
